phase_transport_operator.core_statement: Family transport operators can now be lifted into phase-sensitive transport operators.

stabilize_to_read.meaning: stabilized memory can be opened for readout when family transport and phase overlap are both sufficient

novelty_to_read.meaning: novelty-heavy phase should narrow transport before direct readout

relation_to_read.meaning: relation-lifted states can read out only if the relation support exceeds the switching cost

current_phase_limitation.statement: inventory conditions overlaps and charts, but not yet the full transition law between operational phases

motivation.why_needed: The remaining dynamic gap is no longer concept geometry alone, but transport under phase switching.

mathematical_meaning.core_statement: The bottleneck is not a missing static readout map but a phase-conditioned transport law.
mathematical_meaning.why_useful: This is the missing bridge from family operator closure to a switching-aware dynamic system.

verdict.core_answer: Phase-level transport operators can now be defined as the next layer above family transport operators.
verdict.next_theory_target: merge family and phase transport into a single switching-aware readout law for the next engineering P3 block
